name: Low Fat Chili Mac
recipeIngredient: 8 oz. ground chicken, extra lean, chopped
1 cup tomato sauce, no salt added
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni and drain, keeping it warm.
2. In a large nonstick skillet or pan, spray with cooking spray.
3. Brown the ground chicken with bell pepper and onion over medium-high heat.
4. Add chili powder to the mixture.
5. Stir in canned corn niblets, diced tomatoes, tomato sauce (no salt added), and chopped green bell pepper.
6. Cook until all ingredients are combined and heated through.
7. Add the cooked macaroni and stir until thoroughly heated.
